_comment: Toyota Wigo 1.0 E M/T (1KR-FE, 3-cyl 4-stroke). All numeric fields are configurable.

calibration._comment_tolerance: Asymmetric band: captures tire wear (+2.2%), load compression, and pressure drop. Lower bound 2% below theoretical; upper 2.5% above.
calibration._comment_stability: Number of consecutive 1-Hz GPS samples at stable speed required before feeding a ratio into Welford. 4 s balances lag vs. noise.
calibration._comment_jitter: Speed delta (m/s) below which consecutive GPS readings are considered 'stable'. 0.5 m/s ≈ 1.8 km/h.
